modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Available career events for students inquiry

full_description_text: El usuario está buscando información sobre los eventos de carrera disponibles para los estudiantes. Mencionó que no está seguro de qué opciones hay y necesita ayuda para encontrar esa información. Es importante que pueda acceder a estos eventos para su desarrollo profesional.
